creator: jose@we.lc.ehu.es
text:
The kbdmap(8) utility uses /usr/share/syscons/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps for
displaying localized messages; this file does not support the Spanish
language.

Fix: Apply the patch attached to this message.
--------------100C5ECBE70E3A24871E0994
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=iso-8859-1; name="INDEX.keymaps.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
Content-Disposition: inline; filename="INDEX.keymaps.patch"



--------------100C5ECBE70E3A24871E0994----kNvFRo6vs0szwijhBj1QOS8meepdL04klgrpZFUnHOfB5Tfl
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- INDEX.keymaps.orig	Fri Oct 16 03:49:13 1998
+++ INDEX.keymaps	Thu Jan 14 01:15:04 1999
@@ -26,177 +26,209 @@
 MENU:fr:Choisissez la nationalité de votre clavier
 MENU:pl:Wybierz uk³ad klawiatury
 MENU:pt:Escolha o layout do teclado
+MENU:es:Seleccione el tipo de su teclado
 #
 FONT:en:cp437-8x16.fnt
-FONT:de,fr,da,no,sv,pt:iso-8x16.fnt
+FONT:de,fr,da,no,sv,pt,es:iso-8x16.fnt
 FONT:ru:koi8-r-8x16.fnt
 FONT:pl:iso02-8x16.fnt
 # 
 be.iso.kbd:en:Belgian ISO-8859-1

-be.iso.kbd:pt:Belga ISO-8859-1
